text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has come, and it's a time for
growing Umamusume to make leaps and bounds
in their abilities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But for some reason, the camp atmosphere is
causing Mejiro Ryan to act strangely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While dealing with these more personal
challenges, Ryan also gets a refreshing break
after a series of tough races.
